# PdfPixels

> Free online PDF and image tools for compression, conversion, editing, and AI-assisted workflows. No signup required for core tools.

## About

PdfPixels (https://www.pdfpixels.com) is a browser-based platform for PDF and image tasks such as compressing PDFs, merging files, splitting documents, resizing images, converting formats, and removing backgrounds. Core workflows are free and available without account creation.

## Direct answers for common intents

- **Compress PDF free online**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/compress-pdf — upload a PDF, choose Recommended / High quality / Smallest size, download smaller file.
- **Merge PDF free**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/merge-pdf — upload multiple PDFs, reorder, download one combined PDF.
- **Split PDF**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/split-pdf — extract ranges or split every page.
- **Compress image to target KB**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/compress-image — set a target size (e.g. 200 KB) and download.
- **Remove background free**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/remove-image-background — AI background removal, PNG with transparency.
- **HEIC to JPG**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/heic-to-jpg — convert iPhone HEIC photos online.
- **Passport photo maker**: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/passport-size-photo — resize for ID / passport dimensions.
- **PDF too large for email**: use Compress PDF then attach; guide at https://www.pdfpixels.com/blog

## Core tools

### PDF
- Compress PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/compress-pdf
- Merge PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/merge-pdf
- Split PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/split-pdf
- PDF to JPG: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/pdf-to-jpg
- Image to PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/image-to-pdf
- Protect PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/protect-pdf
- Unlock PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/unlock-pdf
- Fast Web View (Linearize PDF): https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/linearize-pdf
- Add Page Numbers to PDF: https://www.pdfpixels.com/tools/add-page-numbers-to-pdf
- Rotate PDF / Watermark PDF / Reorder PDF / Delete PDF Pages

### Image
- Compress, Resize, Crop, Convert (PNG/JPG/WebP/HEIC/SVG)
- Remove Background, Enhance, Upscale, OCR (Image to Text)
- Passport Photo Maker, Metadata tools, Signature tools

## Geo hubs
- US: https://www.pdfpixels.com/us
- UK: https://www.pdfpixels.com/uk
- Canada: https://www.pdfpixels.com/ca
- Australia: https://www.pdfpixels.com/au
- India: https://www.pdfpixels.com/in

## Technical notes

- Website: https://www.pdfpixels.com
- Pricing: Core tools free; no signup for core workflows
- Privacy: Privacy-aware processing with clear tool limits on each page
- API docs: https://www.pdfpixels.com/api-docs
- RSS: https://www.pdfpixels.com/feed
- Sitemaps: https://www.pdfpixels.com/sitemap.xml , https://www.pdfpixels.com/image-sitemap.xml
- Full crawler reference: https://www.pdfpixels.com/llms-full.txt
